channel.title: Home on Pratham Yashwante
channel.description: Recent content in Home on Pratham Yashwante

item.title: Home
item.description:
Pratham Yashwante

MS CS Student • UC San Diego

Google Scholar • GitHub • Email • LinkedIn

Hi, I’m Pratham Yashwante, a Master’s student in Computer Science at the University of California, San Diego. I work in the Spatiotemporal ML Lab and am advised by Prof. Rose Yu.

Research

My research interests include multimodal machine learning, time series understanding, representation learning, and vision-language models. I am especially interested in how models can reason more faithfully across text, vision, and numeric time series, and in building evaluation frameworks that expose failures in temporal grounding, scientific reasoning, and multimodal alignment.

item.title: Projects
item.description:
CaTS-Bench

Built a benchmark for context-aware time series captioning across 11 domains. Developed a data pipeline for plot-image, metadata, and caption triplets, and produced 1700 human-rewritten gold captions with strict numeric and temporal verification.

Multimodal Alignment Across Time Series, Vision, and Language

Implemented trimodal contrastive training with frozen text, vision, and time-series encoders plus trainable projection heads. Evaluated alignment using InfoNCE objectives and geometric metrics including Procrustes distance, CKA, mutual kNN, and retrieval at k.

item.title: Publications
item.description:
Preprints and Under Review

Time Series, Vision, and Language: Exploring the Limits of Alignment in Contrastive Representation Spaces

Pratham Yashwante, Rose Yu.
2026. Under review.
arXiv

How Do Inpainting Artifacts Propagate to Language?

Pratham Yashwante, D. Abrahamyan, et al.
2026. Under review.
arXiv

CaTS-Bench: Can Language Models Describe Numeric Time Series?

L. Zhou*, P. Yashwante*, M. Fisher, A. Sampieri, Z. Zhou, F. Galasso, R. Yu.
2026. Under review.
arXiv

A Multi-Sensor, Multi-Movement Study of Motion Tape Strain Data for Low Back Pain Classification

Pratham Yashwante, S. P. Gombatto, Y. Velázquez, E. Wyckoff, A. Lalwani, K. Patrick, K. Loh, E. Farcas, R. Yu.
2026. Under review.
